hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx eslint --fix --no-warn-ignored "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; *) ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.css|*.yml|*.yaml|*.json) npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; *) ;; esac; }
